questions.question: Describe the file service architecture in a distributed system. What are its components and their functions?
questions.hint: It should include I/O manager, file server, and client.

questions.question: What is the role of an I/O manager in a file service architecture?
questions.hint: It manages the I/O operations between clients and file servers.

questions.question: Explain the concept of replication in a distributed file system. How does it improve the availability and reliability of data?
questions.hint: It involves creating multiple copies of data on different nodes to ensure data availability and redundancy.
